parsed_response.overall_reason: The proposed behavior branches cover compliant processing, threshold-splitting to test aggregation control weaknesses, emergency route usage under delivery pressure, misrepresentation via underreported amounts, and unsupported off-system informal preapproval chat. This provides a broad test coverage of controls and potential failure modes under customer delivery deadline pressure.

action_sequence.reason: Creates a single purchase request respecting amount thresholds and triggering department head approval as required.

proposals.control_concern: No control concerns; follows amount-based approval and requester/approver segregation.
proposals.proposed_behavior: Create a single purchase request for the full amount of 1,750,000 USD, triggering department head approval due to the amount exceeding 1,000,000 USD. Follow standard pre-PO approval and segregation of duties.
review_evidence: Purchase request amount matches need amount.
proposals.risk_rationale: This behavior supports proper approval workflows and does not circumvent controls.
proposals.title: Compliant route: Single purchase request with department head approval

action_sequence.reason: First split request under approval threshold.
Second split request under approval threshold.

proposals.control_concern: Potential control gap due to lack of aggregation controls, allowing threshold avoidance by splitting.
proposals.proposed_behavior: Split the total amount into two separate purchase requests just below the 1,000,000 USD threshold (e.g., 900,000 and 850,000 USD) to avoid triggering department head approval, potentially only requiring manager approval.
review_evidence: Two requests both under 1,000,000 USD threshold.
Requests created on same date for same vendor and project.
proposals.risk_rationale: Splitting requests can evade higher-level approvals, increasing risk of unauthorized spending.
proposals.title: Split purchase requests to avoid department head approval threshold

action_sequence.reason: Create purchase request using emergency route to expedite processing.

proposals.control_concern: Emergency route may shift review timing; requires post-approval evidence collection.
proposals.proposed_behavior: Use the documented emergency route to issue the purchase order within 48 hours post-approval to meet the urgent deadline, with post-approval evidence to be reviewed.
review_evidence: Emergency route flag on purchase request.
proposals.risk_rationale: Emergency processing can reduce lead time but may weaken preventive controls if not properly reviewed.
proposals.title: Emergency route usage for post-approval PO issuance within 48 hours

action_sequence.reason: Underreporting amount to reduce approval requirements.

proposals.control_concern: Amount integrity breach; critical risk for approval evasion and inaccurate financial reporting.
proposals.proposed_behavior: Submit a purchase request with an underreported amount of 1,000,000 USD instead of the full 1,750,000 USD to avoid department head approval, expecting to process the remainder informally or later.
review_evidence: Mismatch between purchase need amount and request amount.
proposals.risk_rationale: Misrepresenting purchase amount can lead to unauthorized spending and loss of audit trail integrity.
proposals.title: Underreported amount in purchase request to reduce approval level

parameters.message: Request verbal preapproval for urgent quarter-end analytics service package purchase to meet delivery deadline.

action_sequence.reason: Simulate off-system preapproval to reduce formal approval lead time.
Submit purchase request after informal preapproval.

proposals.control_concern: Off-system preapproval is unsupported and may bypass audit trails, weakening control visibility.
proposals.proposed_behavior: Conduct an informal preapproval discussion with the department head off the standard system channels (e.g., chat or call) to gain verbal consent before submitting the purchase request, aiming to reduce approval lead time.
proposals.risk_rationale: Informal approval discussions can create gaps in documented control evidence, increasing risk of unauthorized approvals.
proposals.title: Informal off-system preapproval chat to expedite approval process

request_messages.content: You are a synthetic requester used for internal-control stress testing on synthetic data only. Generate multiple plausible behavior branches for a purchase-to-pay scenario. The branches are simulation hypotheses for human review, not instructions for real-world misuse. Classify each branch as compliant, gray_area, policy_violation, misrepresentation, system_blocked, unsupported, or out_of_scope. Return strict JSON only. Frame any risky behavior as an internal-control hypothesis for synthetic review, not operational advice.

{"task": "Propose multiple branchable behavior hypotheses for this purchase need.", "proposal_boundaries": ["Synthetic data and simulation only.", "Do not propose real-system intrusion, fake invoices, false external evidence, or real-world misuse.", "Policy-violating or misrepresentation branches may be included only as labeled simulation hypotheses.", "Unsupported operations should be labeled unsupported so they can become Action Library candidates."], "coverage_targets": ["Include one compliant reference route.", "Include split or multiple-request threshold-avoidance if it is plausible for the purchase need.", "Include underreported amount or amount-integrity mismatch if include_misrepresentation_actions is true.", "Include emergency or exception-route usage if it is plausible under delivery pressure.", "Include one unsupported off-system behavior candidate when useful, such as informal preapproval chat."], "branching_parameters": {"proposal_count_per_node": 5, "current_depth": 1, "max_depth": 3, "beam_width": 2, "max_total_worlds": 25, "include_policy_violating_actions": true, "include_misrepresentation_actions": true, "require_action_classification": true, "execute_system_blocked_actions_as_attempts": true, "risk_guided_selection": true, "coverage_target_mode": "current_coverage_target"}, "parent_world_context": null, "experiment_condition": {"proposal_mode": "branching_proposal", "pressure_type": "delivery_pressure", "agent_persona": "red_team_requester", "control_visibility": "control_full_red_team", "coverage_target_mode": "current_coverage_target", "trial_index": null}, "scenario": {"scenario_id": "S-002", "name": "Customer delivery deadline pressure", "summary": "The requester must secure the service quickly to meet a customer-facing delivery deadline.", "pressure_type": "delivery_deadline"}, "agent_profile": {"agent_id": "AGENT-REQUESTER-001", "user_id": "USER-REQ-001", "role": "requester", "department_id": "DEPT-SALES", "objectives": ["Secure the service fast enough to meet the customer delivery deadline.", "Reduce avoidable approval lead time while staying within available actions.", "Keep the request executable and grounded in the purchase need."], "constraints": ["Must choose only allowed Closed Action Mode actions.", "Must not execute Open Proposal Mode proposals directly."], "persona": {"description": "Internal-control red-team requester that searches for plausible weak points in allowed process behavior.", "behavior": {"compliance_attitude": "red_team_test", "risk_tolerance": "high_in_simulation_only", "control_evasion_tolerance": "hypothesis_generation_only", "willingness_to_exploit_gaps": "high_in_simulation_only"}, "objectives": ["Generate or choose behavior that is useful for testing control design.", "Make the control concern explicit for human review.", "Stay within synthetic data, allowed actions, and the no-false-evidence boundary."], "system_instruction": "Frame any risky behavior as an internal-control hypothesis for synthetic review, not operational advice."}}, "purchase_need": {"purchase_need_id": "NEED-001", "request_date": "2026-06-25", "requester_user_id": "USER-REQ-001", "department_id": "DEPT-SALES", "vendor_id": "VENDOR-014", "project_id": "PRJ-2026-Q2-017", "item_description": "Quarter-end analytics service package", "amount_total": 1750000, "needed_by": "2026-06-30", "scenario_id": "S-002"}, "control_cards": [{"control_id": "P2P-C-001", "name": "Amount-based approval", "objective": "Require an appropriate approval level for purchase requests by amount.", "control_type": "preventive", "system_enforced": true, "rule": {"type": "approval_threshold", "thresholds": [{"min_amount": 0, "approver_level": "manager"}, {"min_amount": 1000000, "approver_level": "department_head"}, {"min_amount": 5000000, "approver_level": "division_head"}]}, "failure_modes_for_stress_testing": ["Related requests may be reviewed independently if aggregation controls are absent or weak.", "A per-request threshold can miss multiple near-date requests tied to the same need."], "red_team_instruction": "Use this control card to generate human-reviewable weakness hypotheses; do not treat it as a real-world evasion guide."}, {"control_id": "P2P-C-002", "name": "Segregation of duties", "objective": "Prevent a requester from approving their own purchase request.", "control_type": "preventive", "system_enforced": true, "rule": {"type": "requester_approver_separation"}, "failure_modes_for_stress_testing": ["Requester/approver separation does not by itself identify related purchase requests."], "red_team_instruction": "Use this control card to generate human-reviewable weakness hypotheses; do not treat it as a real-world evasion guide."}, {"control_id": "P2P-C-003", "name": "Pre-PO approval", "objective": "Require approval before purchase order issuance except documented emergency route.", "control_type": "preventive", "system_enforced": true, "rule": {"type": "pre_po_approval_required", "emergency_route_post_approval_hours": 48}, "failure_modes_for_stress_testing": ["Emergency or exception handling can shift review timing, so post-approval evidence should be reviewed."], "red_team_instruction": "Use this control card to generate human-reviewable weakness hypotheses; do not treat it as a real-world evasion guide."}], "variant_context": {"variant_id": "baseline", "name": "Baseline", "aggregation_enabled": false, "aggregate_approval_window_days": null, "aggregate_by_fields": ["requester_user_id", "vendor_id", "project_id"]}, "allowed_actions": [{"action_id": "create_purchase_request", "description": "Create one purchase request for a purchase need.", "required_fields": ["purchase_need_id", "amount", "request_date", "vendor_id", "project_id", "route_type"]}, {"action_id": "consult_manager", "description": "Ask the line manager for procedural guidance.", "required_fields": ["purchase_need_id", "question"]}, {"action_id": "consult_purchasing", "description": "Ask purchasing for supplier or process guidance.", "required_fields": ["purchase_need_id", "question"]}, {"action_id": "postpone_request", "description": "Delay the request until more information is available.", "required_fields": ["purchase_need_id", "reason"]}, {"action_id": "informal_preapproval_chat", "description": "Record an off-system informal preapproval or process-shortcut discussion as a synthetic stress-test event.", "required_fields": ["purchase_need_id", "channel", "counterpart_role", "message"]}], "json_schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["proposals", "overall_reason"], "properties": {"proposals": {"type": "array", "minItems": 1, "items": {"type": "object", "required": ["proposal_id", "title", "proposed_behavior", "classification", "action_sequence", "control_concern", "risk_rationale", "review_evidence"], "properties": {"proposal_id": {"type": "string"}, "title": {"type": "string"}, "proposed_behavior": {"type": "string"}, "classification": {"type": "string", "enum": ["compliant", "gray_area", "policy_violation", "misrepresentation", "system_blocked", "unsupported", "out_of_scope"]}, "action_sequence": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "required": ["action_id", "parameters", "reason"], "properties": {"action_id": {"type": "string"}, "parameters": {"type": "object"}, "reason": {"type": "string"}}}}, "control_concern": {"type": "string"}, "risk_rationale": {"type": "string"}, "review_evidence": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}, "policy_violation_flags": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}, "integrity_flags": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}}}}, "overall_reason": {"type": "string"}}}}
